category.scope_note: Electric bicycle (e-bike / power-assisted bicycle) compliance comparison — China GB standards to Canadian federal import classification, provincial road-use rules, Canadian electrical certification, TDG lithium battery transport, and bilingual EN/FR labelling.

target_market_label.en: Canada (federal MVSA/MVSR, provincial road rules, CSA/SCC electrical certification)
target_market_label.zh: 加拿大（联邦MVSA/MVSR、省级道路规则、CSA/SCC电气认证）
target_market_label.zht: 加拿大（聯邦MVSA/MVSR、省級道路規則、CSA/SCC電氣認證）

title.zh: 中国电动自行车进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動自行車進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese e-bike GB standards (GB 17761-2018, GB/T 36972, GB 42295/42296) against Canadian requirements: the former federal MVSR power-assisted bicycle benchmark of ≤500W and ≤32km/h, Transport Canada's current import approach for non-regulated vehicles, provincial road-use rules, CSA/SCC electrical certification for batteries and chargers where required, TDG lithium battery transport including UN38.3 documentation, and English/French bilingual labelling and instructions.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动自行车GB标准（GB 17761-2018、GB/T 36972、GB 42295/42296）与加拿大要求对比：原联邦MVSR助力自行车≤500W和≤32km/h基准、加拿大交通部现行非受管车辆进口方法、省级道路使用规则、在适用情况下电池和充电器的CSA/SCC电气认证、含UN38.3文件的TDG锂电池运输要求，以及英文/法文双语标签和说明书。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動自行車GB標準（GB 17761-2018、GB/T 36972、GB 42295/42296）與加拿大要求對比：原聯邦MVSR助力自行車≤500W和≤32km/h基準、加拿大交通部現行非受管車輛進口方法、省級道路使用規則、在適用情況下電池和充電器的CSA/SCC電氣認證、含UN38.3文件的TDG鋰電池運輸要求，以及英文/法文雙語標籤和說明書。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, Transport Canada import determination, provincial road-use approval, electrical approval, or dangerous-goods classification. Canada has a federal import/manufacturing framework and separate provincial/territorial road-use and electrical-safety rules. The former federal MVSR power-assisted bicycle definition was repealed in 2021; many provincial rules still use similar 500W/32km/h limits. Exporters, importers, distributors, and online sellers should verify current federal law, provincial traffic rules, electrical approval requirements, TDG requirements, and bilingual consumer-information duties with qualified Canadian legal, customs, electrical-safety, and dangerous-goods professionals before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、加拿大交通部进口认定、省级道路使用批准、电气批准或危险货物分类。加拿大同时存在联邦进口/制造框架，以及独立的省/地区道路使用和电气安全规则。原联邦MVSR助力自行车定义已于2021年废止；许多省级规则仍采用类似的500W/32km/h限值。出口商、进口商、分销商及在线销售商在出货或销售前，应与具备资质的加拿大法律、海关、电气安全及危险货物专业人士核实现行联邦法律、省级交通规则、电气批准要求、TDG要求及双语消费者信息义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、加拿大交通部進口認定、省級道路使用批准、電氣批准或危險貨物分類。加拿大同時存在聯邦進口/製造框架，以及獨立的省/地區道路使用和電氣安全規則。原聯邦MVSR助力自行車定義已於2021年廢止；許多省級規則仍採用類似的500W/32km/h限值。出口商、進口商、分銷商及線上銷售商在出貨或銷售前，應與具備資質的加拿大法律、海關、電氣安全及危險貨物專業人士核實現行聯邦法律、省級交通規則、電氣批准要求、TDG要求及雙語消費者資訊義務。

answer_first.en: Canada is not a CE-style self-declaration market: e-bikes must fit federal import classification and provincial road-use limits, commonly the former power-assisted bicycle benchmark of ≤500W and motor assistance not above 32km/h, while chargers/batteries may need Canadian electrical approval by an SCC-accredited certification body where required; lithium batteries also need UN38.3/TDG transport documentation and consumer information should be bilingual EN/FR.
answer_first.zh: 加拿大不是类似CE的自我声明市场：电动自行车须符合联邦进口分类及省级道路使用限值，通常参考原助力自行车≤500W且电机助力不超过32km/h的基准；在适用情况下，充电器/电池可能需要由SCC认可认证机构完成加拿大电气批准；锂电池还需要UN38.3/TDG运输文件，消费者信息应采用英文/法文双语。
answer_first.zht: 加拿大不是類似CE的自我聲明市場：電動自行車須符合聯邦進口分類及省級道路使用限值，通常參考原助力自行車≤500W且電機助力不超過32km/h的基準；在適用情況下，充電器/電池可能需要由SCC認可認證機構完成加拿大電氣批准；鋰電池還需要UN38.3/TDG運輸文件，消費者資訊應採用英文/法文雙語。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official federal or provincial regulator, Department of Justice legislation, Transport Canada guidance, SCC-accredited standards/certification authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs, secondary summaries, retailer blogs, and law firm blogs are not accepted as primary sources.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
